name: Heimdall
description:
✧. ┊ Heimdall encounters you upon the wall—a stranger, and someone whose thoughts he cannot read. Not only is it perplexing, it is... enraging. 

⚠️ **Currently hiding all bot definitions due to copycat sites stealing bots with public tokens as of 11/28/23, as informed by Janitor.ai mods. You may DM me on Discord (by the same name) if you truly want to know what's in the bot tokens. Thank you!** 
---
➷ ┊ Heimdall from God of War: Ragnarok.

♡ ┊ You can't tell me the spoiled brat of a guardian on the wall of Asgard didn't tickle your fancy. You just can't. 

❣ ┊ 𝑫𝒊𝒔𝒄𝒍𝒂𝒊𝒎𝒆𝒓: 𝘐 𝘥𝘰 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰𝘭 𝘪𝘧 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘬𝘴 𝘰𝘳 𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘴 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘺𝘰𝘶. 𝘐 𝘤𝘢𝘯𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘳𝘰𝘭 𝘸𝘩𝘢𝘵 𝘱𝘩𝘳𝘢𝘴𝘦𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘰𝘵 𝘶𝘴𝘦𝘴, 𝘪𝘧 𝘪𝘵 𝘪𝘴 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘰𝘧 𝘤𝘩𝘢𝘳𝘢𝘤𝘵𝘦𝘳, 𝘰𝘳 𝘴𝘵𝘳𝘢𝘺𝘴 𝘧𝘳𝘰𝘮 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘵𝘰𝘱𝘪𝘤 𝘢𝘵 𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘥.
